text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The holiday season is upon us once again. It
comes and goes faster than a runner in the
Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Who ever suggested that I should come
through the chimney? It's narrow beyond belief!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my bag's all caught up. This calls for a bit of
pushing to make things right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack, I've ripped it! But at least it's loose!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hyuck hyuck, indeed I am! Now, hand over yer
gold!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Hold up. It's the holidays, right? No point in
hiding it now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm Mati-santa Fuku-claus! I'm here to give
presents to all the good boys and girls!
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. Can you say your name again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oof! Please, could I not? It's not like I didn't say it
right the first time...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, I have a present for you. Put your hand
in the bag and pull out whatever you like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm giving out presents, fortune-slip style! I'll give
you whatever you pull out, all right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I put my hand in and grab the first thing I touch...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take a look... Great fortune!
Congratulations! Pulling great fortune is a gift in
itself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you not happy? Guess I'll have to make
this right. Here, take this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! Inside the box is a festive tree that's a
thousand years old! A plastic replica of it,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's a good prize. Go on, open it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I unwrap my present and open the box...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, nooo! The star at the top of the treeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The star has snapped right off. It probably broke
when she snagged it inside the chimney.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, I can only apologize... What sort of
Mati-santa am I...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer. Could you come outside with me for
a moment?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Can I get some glue and tape, please?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just give me a moment—I'll fix this right up.
Uuugh, this is so embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted today's celebrations to be a little
more holy-feeling. This is so pathetic...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Sniff... You're so kind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
While you're being so kind, could I ask you for
another favor? When we get back, could you help
me stick the star back on?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It can wait until after we've eaten our holiday
cake, though. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the tribulations, we have fun trying to
mend the tree together. Strangely enough, it's
turned out to be a pretty heartwarming holiday.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, plan B! Time to pull out my secret weapon!
Come on, Trainer, lift the tree high up into the
sky!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it look like there's a real star on top of it
now? How romantic is that!
choice_data_list: I want to have a proper star on top.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack! My little illusion wasn't good enough for
you? I thought I really turned on the charm
there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I guess I'd better use the star that fell off, huh? Sigh...
choice_data_list:
Why don't you use the star that you'll win at the
Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? The Arima Kinen? That's still coming... up...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see what you did there! That was actually
pretty cool. Seems I'm no match for you.
choice_data_list: Promise me you'll get that star?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... Y-yeah, I'll do it. By the way...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're dressed to impress today, huh? My heart is
racing just looking at you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My face is so red, I'm about to become
Matikane-feelin'-the-heat-now. Wait, we're right
in the middle of winter. Did I just flub another
joke?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We still don't have the star we need for the tree.
It's time to go and win it for ourselves.
